name: The Software DevLOVEper
overview: A group of four people including Shannu work in a software company when a new girl, Vaishnavi, joins their team. Shannu falls in love with Vaishnavi and tries to spend time with her but she treats him like a friend.

trailers.title: The Software DevLOVEper Movie  || Shanmukh Jaswanth || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Infinitum Media
